name: Law Office of D.L. Drain, P.A.
description_short: Arizona bankruptcy attorney offering personalized Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 filing services, foreclosure assistance, and free consultations since 1991.
description_long:
Law Office of D.L. Drain, P.A. is an Arizona-based bankruptcy law firm founded in 1991 and led by attorney Diane L. Drain. Operating from Phoenix and Show Low, the firm has assisted thousands of clients through personal and business bankruptcy filings over three decades. The firm positions itself as an alternative to mass-market bankruptcy attorneys and DIY filers, emphasizing individualized attention and strategic planning.

The firm provides comprehensive bankruptcy services including Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 individual filings, small business bankruptcy, foreclosure defense, trustee sale assistance, and client education. They offer free initial consultations and advertise affordable payment plans to make legal services accessible. The firm operates a client-focused approach, framing bankruptcy not as financial failure but as the beginning of financial freedom when properly executed.

Diane Drain emphasizes customized bankruptcy planning to prevent common client mistakes such as loss of tax refunds, vehicle repossession, and inheritance forfeiture. The firm highlights the "automatic stay" protection that bankruptcy provides, which halts collection actions and creditor contact. Client testimonials consistently praise the emotional support, expertise, and respectful treatment received throughout the filing process, with multiple 5-star reviews available on their website.

As a solo or small-firm operation, this represents a traditional bankruptcy law practice focused on individual relationships rather than high-volume processing. Clients should verify current licensing and disciplinary history independently. The firm's marketing emphasizes emotional reassurance alongside legal expertise, which may appeal to anxious filers but should not substitute for thorough vetting of any attorney's credentials and experience.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Free initial bankruptcy consultation with the attorney
Established 33-year track record (since 1991) with thousands of clients served
Offers affordable payment plans to reduce upfront cost barriers
Serves all of Arizona from two physical locations (Phoenix and Show Low)
Customized bankruptcy planning to prevent loss of tax refunds, vehicles, and inheritances
Multiple 5-star client testimonials praising personalized attention and compassion
Provides education component to help clients understand the bankruptcy process
cons: No information about attorney credentials, bar certification, or disciplinary history available on website
Website does not specify Chapter 7 vs. Chapter 13 eligibility criteria or filing timelines
No transparent fee structure listed; relies on 'affordable payment plans' without pricing details
Limited online presence or third-party review verification beyond testimonials on their own site
Small firm structure may limit availability compared to larger bankruptcy practices
best_for: Arizona residents facing foreclosure or trustee sales seeking legal defense
Individuals and small business owners wanting personalized bankruptcy planning rather than mass-market processing
Clients experiencing financial anxiety who benefit from direct attorney relationship and emotional support
People at risk of losing tax refunds, vehicles, or inheritances and needing strategic filing guidance
diagnosis: Law Office of D.L. Drain, P.A. is best for Arizona residents seeking personalized bankruptcy representation from an established attorney who emphasizes client relationships and customized planning over high-volume processing. The primary caveat is that no fee structure is publicly disclosed and credentials cannot be verified from the website alone—prospective clients should independently confirm bar status, verify experience with their specific bankruptcy chapter, and obtain detailed fee estimates before engaging.
services: Small business bankruptcy filing and guidance
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
